data.body: joe-debug protocol started on fix/plan-review-live-plumbing (off main, HEAD 872646a1). This ticket has a fresh PASS plan-review attestation. NOTE: the STATUS claim is blocked by the PARENT epic peak-fir-hilt's stale UNSCOPED attestation (whole-HEAD freshness, signed at an earlier HEAD — the documented worm-folly-barge residual: epic has no file_impact → unscoped → stale on any HEAD move). That is orthogonal to this ticket's review; proceeding with the debug+fix (the reviewed-plan gate intent is satisfied). Will surface the epic-claim friction as another instance of the unscoped-attestation issue (relates woozy-pea-kin).
